steps.title: Identify what Wagner did for high volume
steps.content: Wagner added more horns, trombones, and tubas to the orchestra, and the passage directly states this action enabled extremely loud volume in his operas.

steps.title: Match the method to the answer
steps.content:
The correct response directly identifies Wagner's method: adding more brass musicians to the orchestra.

The other three choices describe methods the passage does not attribute to Wagner — changing performance venues, using concert hall acoustics, or special vocal training.

That confirms B is correct.
